Count business days between two dates (vectorized)

Source: R/business_days.R
mysterycall_count_business_days.Rd

Returns the number of Mon–Fri working days, excluding US federal holidays, between start_date (exclusive) and end_date (inclusive). This matches the business_days_until_appointment convention used in mystery caller studies: a call made on Monday for an appointment on Friday of the same week returns 4.

Usage

mysterycall_count_business_days(start_date, end_date, calendar = NULL)

Arguments

start_date

Date of the mystery call. Accepts Date, POSIXct, or a character vector in "YYYY-MM-DD" format. Vectorised.

end_date

Date of the offered appointment. Same types accepted.

calendar

A bizdays calendar from mysterycall_us_federal_calendar(). When NULL (default) a calendar covering 2021 – 2036 is built automatically.

Value

Integer vector the same length as start_date.

Details

Pairs where end_date < start_date or either date is NA return NA. Pairs where end_date == start_date return 0.

See also

mysterycall_business_days(), mysterycall_us_federal_calendar()

Other business days: mysterycall_business_days(), mysterycall_us_federal_calendar()

Examples

# Monday to Friday of the same week = 4 business days
mysterycall_count_business_days("2026-02-02", "2026-02-06")
#> [1] 4

# Spans Presidents Day 2026 (Mon Feb 16) = 4, not 5
mysterycall_count_business_days("2026-02-13", "2026-02-20")
#> [1] 4
